scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome && node scripts/package-extension.mjs chrome
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && node scripts/package-extension.mjs firefox
scripts.package:all: npm run package:chrome && npm run package:firefox
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm run package:all
